completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: web (React 19.2.4 PWA + TS 5.9.3 + Vite 7.3.1 + Supabase 2.97.0 + Zustand 5.0.11 + Tailwind 4.1.17 + Zod 4.3.6 + Sentry 10.39.0)
Found 111 existing doc files, 23 SQL migrations, 60 test files (unit + E2E + API), 11 CI workflows, 180+ source files at 45,547 LOC
Tech stack: React 19.2.4, TS 5.9.3, Vite 7.3.1, Zustand 5.0.11, Supabase 2.97.0, Tailwind 4.1.17, Zod 4.3.6, Sentry 10.39.0, Framer Motion 12.34.3

5 parallel agents completed exhaustive rescan: Agent A (architecture+source-tree: 20 files updated, 7 verified accurate), Agent B (api-reference+data-models: 14 files updated, 10 verified accurate), Agent C1 (component-inventory: 8 files updated, 1 verified accurate), Agent C2 (state-management: 9 files updated), Agent D (project-overview+dev-guide+performance+index: 24 files updated). Key corrections: dotenvx→fnox/age (19 files), 12 version numbers corrected, migration count 21→24, Epic 4 hardening documented (auth guards, Sentry, reconnect, error handling), fresh build metrics captured
Master index.md updated: corrected date to 2026-03-03, architecture patterns 8→10, data flow patterns 6→7, hooks 12→14, migration count to 24, fnox/age references, updated footer date
Validation: No '(To be generated)' markers found. No TBD/TODO/Pending/Coming soon markers found. Checklist reviewed against all sections. All required documentation present.
Workflow complete. 75 files updated across 9 sections + index. All dotenvx→fnox corrections applied. Epic 4 hardening fully documented.
